rules.name: local_file_read_allowed
rules.description: Stage151 may read deterministic local JSONL fixtures.

rules.name: store_write_blocked
rules.description: Stage151 must not write memory records.

rules.name: record_mutation_blocked
rules.description: Loaded records must not be mutated by the store.

rules.name: query_runtime_deferred
rules.description: Ranking and query runtime remain deferred to Stage152.
